query:
SELECT 
  contract_no, paid_month, period_no, is_bad_debt_row,
  CAST(principal AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS principal,
  CAST(interest AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS interest,
  CAST(fee AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS fee,
  CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS discount,
  CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS total_amount,
  payment_external_id
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE contract_no = 'CT1025-CCO026-17631-01'
ORDER BY period_no;
